tools.description: Bind one exact pending efficiency-data affair. Pass any opinion already supplied by the user; omitted opinion stays editable in the trusted card.
tools.name: oa_efficiency_data_approval_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Efficiency-Data Approval

tools.description: Consume one approved authorization and verify that the exact efficiency-data item leaves the pending collection.
tools.name: oa_efficiency_data_approve
tools.title: Approve Authorized OA Efficiency Data

tools.description: Bind one exact pending travel-expense reimbursement. Pass any opinion already supplied; AgentBridge shows amount, key fields, and attachment count.
tools.name: oa_travel_expense_approval_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Travel-Expense Approval

tools.description: Consume one approved authorization and verify that the exact travel-expense reimbursement leaves the pending collection.
tools.name: oa_travel_expense_approve
tools.title: Approve Authorized OA Travel Expense

tools.description: Bind one exact pending weekly-report inform item. This is acknowledgement, not approval; pass any review opinion already supplied by the user.
tools.name: oa_weekly_report_acknowledgement_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Weekly-Report Acknowledgement

tools.description: Consume one approved authorization, acknowledge the exact weekly-report inform item, and verify pending disappearance.
tools.name: oa_weekly_report_acknowledge
tools.title: Acknowledge Authorized OA Weekly Report

tools.description: Bind one exact ordinary collaboration affair outside registered HR, expense, procurement, seal, efficiency-data, and weekly-report profiles.
tools.name: oa_standard_collaboration_approval_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Standard-Collaboration Approval

tools.description: Consume one approved authorization and verify that the exact ordinary collaboration item leaves the pending collection.
tools.name: oa_standard_collaboration_approve
tools.title: Approve Authorized OA Standard Collaboration

tools.description: Describe this remote MCP endpoint, trusted-interaction delivery methods, client footprint, and write-safety boundary.
tools.name: agentbridge_server_profile
tools.title: Get AgentBridge Server Profile

tools.description: List templates available to the authenticated OA user.
tools.name: oa_template_list
tools.title: List OA Templates

tools.description: List pending workflows for the authenticated OA user.
tools.name: oa_workflow_pending_list
tools.title: List Pending OA Workflows

tools.description: List completed workflows for the authenticated OA user.
tools.name: oa_workflow_done_list
tools.title: List Completed OA Workflows

tools.description: List tracked workflows for the authenticated OA user.
tools.name: oa_workflow_tracked_list
tools.title: List Tracked OA Workflows

tools.description: Get rendered business fields, text, attachments, and opinions for an opaque workflow affair ID returned by a list tool.
tools.name: oa_workflow_detail_get
tools.title: Get OA Workflow Detail

tools.description: List structured opinions for an opaque workflow affair ID.
tools.name: oa_workflow_opinions_list
tools.title: List OA Workflow Opinions

tools.description: Bind one opaque affair ID from a prior sent-workflow result and pass any revoke comment already supplied by the user. AgentBridge opens a prefilled trusted card, validates the exact active target, and creates separate revoke authorization.
tools.name: oa_workflow_revoke_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Workflow Revoke

tools.description: Consume one approved authorization, revoke exactly one frozen sent workflow through OA's native action, and verify that the same workflow returned to wait-send with revoked state.
tools.name: oa_workflow_revoke
tools.title: Revoke Authorized OA Workflow

tools.description: On the first call, pass every business-trip field already supplied by the user. AgentBridge opens a prefilled trusted card; omitted fields remain editable. After field submission it validates the live OA form and creates draft confirmation.
tools.name: oa_business_trip_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Business Trip Draft

tools.description: Consume one approved trusted authorization, save the frozen plan as a wait-send OA draft, and verify it by server reload. It never submits the workflow.
tools.name: oa_business_trip_save_draft
tools.title: Save Authorized OA Business Trip Draft

tools.description: On the first call, pass every business-trip field already supplied by the user. AgentBridge opens a prefilled trusted card, validates the live OA form and sent baseline after field submission, then creates formal-submit authorization.
tools.name: oa_business_trip_submit_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Business Trip Submission

tools.description: Consume one approved authorization, formally send the frozen business-trip request into OA approval, and verify one new sent item.
tools.name: oa_business_trip_submit
tools.title: Submit Authorized OA Business Trip Request

tools.description: On the first call, pass every supported leave field already supplied by the user. AgentBridge opens a prefilled trusted card; omitted fields remain editable. After field submission it validates OA and creates draft-save confirmation.
tools.name: oa_leave_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Leave Draft

tools.description: Consume one approved authorization, save a wait-send leave draft, and verify it by server reload. It never submits the workflow.
tools.name: oa_leave_save_draft
tools.title: Save Authorized OA Leave Draft

tools.description: On the first call, pass every supported leave field already supplied by the user. AgentBridge opens a prefilled trusted card, validates OA and the sent baseline after field submission, then creates formal-submit authorization.
tools.name: oa_leave_submit_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Leave Submission

tools.description: Consume one approved authorization, formally send the frozen leave request into OA approval, and verify one new readable sent item.
tools.name: oa_leave_submit
tools.title: Submit Authorized OA Leave Request

tools.description: On the first call, pass every missed-punch field already supplied by the user. AgentBridge opens a prefilled trusted card; omitted fields remain editable. After field submission it validates OA and creates draft-save confirmation.
tools.name: oa_missed_punch_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Missed-Punch Draft

tools.description: Consume one approved authorization, save a wait-send missed-punch draft, and verify it by server reload. It never submits the workflow.
tools.name: oa_missed_punch_save_draft
tools.title: Save Authorized OA Missed-Punch Draft

tools.description: Bind one opaque pending affair ID and pass any approval opinion already supplied by the user. AgentBridge opens a prefilled trusted card, validates the exact missed-punch target, and creates separate approval confirmation.
tools.name: oa_missed_punch_approval_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Missed-Punch Approval

tools.description: Consume one approved authorization, approve the frozen missed-punch item, and verify that it left the pending collection.
tools.name: oa_missed_punch_approve
tools.title: Approve Authorized OA Missed-Punch Request

tools.description: On the first call, pass any subject, requested room wording, start_time, and end_time already supplied by the user. AgentBridge checks live OA room availability before opening a prefilled card with real room options. After field submission it rechecks availability and creates a separate confirmation.
tools.name: oa_meeting_create_prepare
tools.title: Prepare OA Meeting Creation

tools.description: Consume one approved authorization, recheck room availability, create and send the meeting, then verify room-list and meeting-view readback.
tools.name: oa_meeting_create
tools.title: Create Authorized OA Meeting

tools.description: Verify the authenticated caller's active central OA session against OA. Non-active sessions are reported from the registry without asking for credentials.
tools.name: oa_session_status
tools.title: Verify OA Session Status

tools.description: Reuse and refresh a valid central OA session. Only when OA confirms that the session is no longer authenticated, create a short-lived trusted authentication card. Credentials are entered only in that card and never in MCP arguments.
tools.name: oa_session_login
tools.title: Ensure OA Session Login

tools.description: Read one host-independent trusted interaction envelope. Poll this tool until resume.ready is true; never collect credential or business-field values in the model conversation.
tools.name: agentbridge_interaction_get
tools.title: Get AgentBridge User Interaction

tools.description: Continue an interaction after the user completed its trusted surface. This tool cannot enter fields or approve a plan; it only consumes an already completed, user-bound interaction.
tools.name: agentbridge_interaction_resume
tools.title: Resume Completed AgentBridge Interaction

tools.description: Get one operation owned by the authenticated caller.
tools.name: agentbridge_operation_get
tools.title: Get AgentBridge Operation

tools.description: List recent operations owned by the authenticated caller.
tools.name: agentbridge_operation_list
tools.title: List AgentBridge Operations
